acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: Create a TypeScript middleware for context scope management
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: Created services/bg-remover/lib/middleware/context-scope.ts with proper implementation that follows AWS Lambda patterns
Imported ContextScope from '@carousellabs/context-scope' which matches the dependency version from context
Implemented APIGatewayProxyHandlerV2 type and proper async handler structure
Added CONTEXT_SCOPE_README.md and context-scope.test.ts with comprehensive tests

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: Comply with existing project structure and patterns
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: Files placed in lib/middleware directory following existing naming conventions

notes: The implementation creates a reusable middleware for context scope management that can be applied to any Lambda handler in the bg-remover service. It sets up basic request tracking with requestId and functionName, properly handles both success and error cases, and integrates well with existing middleware patterns in the codebase.
